options.name: -depth
options.description: depth of the pin or pin group, in micrometers

options.name: -end_location
options.description: specifies the coordinates where pins should end when pin spreading along a range

options.name: -expand_spacing_factor
options.description: speify value will be multiplied to the current spacing in tracks

options.name: -layer
options.description: name of the metal layer for the pin or pin group

options.name: -loc
options.description: new x and y location for the pin or pin group

options.name: -moveOnLayer
options.description: specify move on layer UP or DOWN

options.name: -noFixed
options.description: moved pins or group of pins are not set to the fixed status

options.name: -spacing
options.description: display the spacing bwteen pins for multi-pin editing

options.name: -spread_type
options.description: specify how to mange spacing between pins while moving grouped-pins

options.name: -start_location
options.description: specifies the coordinates where pins should start when pin spreading along a range

options.name: -width
options.description: width of the pin or pin group, in micrometers
